questions.statement: At the time of sunrise, Diksha and Arpita are sitting in a park with their backs facing each other. If the shadow of Diksha falls to the right of Arpita, then in which direction is Arpita facing?

Mayank leaves his home and walks 27 m towards the north to reach the sports shop. Then he turns right and walks 37 m to reach the bakery. Then he turns right and walks 42 m. Then he turns left and walks 22 m. Finally, he turns left and walks 15 m to reach the stadium. In which direction and how far is he from the starting point?
Mousumi is facing east. She turns 135&deg; in clockwise direction and then she turns another 225&deg;&nbsp;in anticlockwise direction. Which direction is she facing now?
Neha walks 3 m towards the west and then 5 m towards the northeast. She again walks 3 m west and then again 5 m northeast. How far is she from the starting point?

A boy starts running from his house and runs towards east. After running a distance of 40 m, he took a right turn, again after running 15 m, he took a left turn, and again after running 20 m, he took a right turn. Which direction is the boy facing now?&nbsp;&nbsp;
